summary: The footage captures a vehicle traveling along a suburban street lined with trees and buildings. Vehicles are parked along both sides of the road. The vehicle maintains a steady pace while observing the surroundings.

events_timeline.event: A white SUV drives past the camera on the right side of the road.

uncertainties: The identity of the vehicles passing by is unclear due to limited visibility.

risk_assessment.why: There are no apparent collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions between vehicles or pedestrians.
